item.title: Wiki Editor [IDEs]
item.itunes:title: Wiki Editor [IDEs]
item.itunes:author: hitokiri-2
item.itunes:summary:
Wiki Editor
(IDEs)
PyGtk4 application designed to create, change, and enrich wiki contents.
A simple text-editor using GtkSource 5 to do simple actions such as find/replace text contents.

Wiki-Editor can be modified by editing local file araclar.py.
See wiki-page for further explanations.

https://www.opencode.net/hitokiri-2/wiki-editor-3-0/-/wikis/home

[read more]
item.description:
Wiki Editor
(IDEs)
PyGtk4 application designed to create, change, and enrich wiki contents.
A simple text-editor using GtkSource 5 to do simple actions such as find/replace text contents.

Wiki-Editor can be modified by editing local file araclar.py.
See wiki-page for further explanations.

https://www.opencode.net/hitokiri-2/wiki-editor-3-0/-/wikis/home

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Wiki Editor
(IDEs)
PyGtk4 application designed to create, change, and enrich wiki contents.
A simple text-editor using GtkSource 5 to do simple actions such as find/replace text contents.

Wiki-Editor can be modified by editing local file araclar.py.
See wiki-page for further explanations.

https://www.opencode.net/hitokiri-2/wiki-editor-3-0/-/wikis/home

[read more]

item.title: Android File Restore Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Android File Restore Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recoverydata
item.itunes:summary:
Android File Restore Program
(Utilities)
Are you tensed for recovering of erased pictures from android devices? If yes then purchase Android File Restore Program that gives comprehensive way to rescue misplaced video songs from logically crashed android memory card without any alteration. Cost effective android storage media repairing utility gives facility to relocate deleted business folders, mp3/mp4 songs and movies from infected android based hard disk in simplified manner.

[read more]
item.description:
Android File Restore Program
(Utilities)
Are you tensed for recovering of erased pictures from android devices? If yes then purchase Android File Restore Program that gives comprehensive way to rescue misplaced video songs from logically crashed android memory card without any alteration. Cost effective android storage media repairing utility gives facility to relocate deleted business folders, mp3/mp4 songs and movies from infected android based hard disk in simplified manner.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Android File Restore Program
(Utilities)
Are you tensed for recovering of erased pictures from android devices? If yes then purchase Android File Restore Program that gives comprehensive way to rescue misplaced video songs from logically crashed android memory card without any alteration. Cost effective android storage media repairing utility gives facility to relocate deleted business folders, mp3/mp4 songs and movies from infected android based hard disk in simplified manner.

[read more]

item.title: RPGMaker MV/MZ Save Editor [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: RPGMaker MV/MZ Save Editor [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: loup
item.itunes:summary:
RPGMaker MV/MZ Save Editor
(Utilities)
This is a tool for editing RPGMaker save files. It currently supports save files written by RPG Maker MV (.rpgsave) & MZ (.rmmzsave), but support for other versions of RPGMaker is planned for the future.
It uses Node.js for the backend and Electron for the GUI, which means you can interact with it using npm.

Works without internet access.
[read more]
item.description:
RPGMaker MV/MZ Save Editor
(Utilities)
This is a tool for editing RPGMaker save files. It currently supports save files written by RPG Maker MV (.rpgsave) & MZ (.rmmzsave), but support for other versions of RPGMaker is planned for the future.
It uses Node.js for the backend and Electron for the GUI, which means you can interact with it using npm.

Works without internet access.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
RPGMaker MV/MZ Save Editor
(Utilities)
This is a tool for editing RPGMaker save files. It currently supports save files written by RPG Maker MV (.rpgsave) & MZ (.rmmzsave), but support for other versions of RPGMaker is planned for the future.
It uses Node.js for the backend and Electron for the GUI, which means you can interact with it using npm.

Works without internet access.
[read more]

item.title: Virtual Machine Manager [Virtualization]
item.itunes:title: Virtual Machine Manager [Virtualization]
item.itunes:author: aurangzeb
item.itunes:summary:
Virtual Machine Manager
(Virtualization)
This appimage is built using junest.
Tested on Fedora Kinoite 40 / Fedora Atomic 40.

*** NOTE ***
You must use Hypervisor QEMU/KVM user-session. Since root doesn't work on appimage.

!!! Report if doesn't work on your distro.
[read more]
item.description:
Virtual Machine Manager
(Virtualization)
This appimage is built using junest.
Tested on Fedora Kinoite 40 / Fedora Atomic 40.

*** NOTE ***
You must use Hypervisor QEMU/KVM user-session. Since root doesn't work on appimage.

!!! Report if doesn't work on your distro.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Virtual Machine Manager
(Virtualization)
This appimage is built using junest.
Tested on Fedora Kinoite 40 / Fedora Atomic 40.

*** NOTE ***
You must use Hypervisor QEMU/KVM user-session. Since root doesn't work on appimage.

!!! Report if doesn't work on your distro.
[read more]

item.title: FIX AIM BOOST NO ROOT FAB [Virtualization]
item.itunes:title: FIX AIM BOOST NO ROOT FAB [Virtualization]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
FIX AIM BOOST NO ROOT FAB
(Virtualization)

[h3] [b] MORE NON ROOTED TWEAKS [/b] [/h3]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/2056054/]1.GODSPEED MODE NO ROOT [/url]
[b] THIS APP HAS MORE THAN 30 OPTIONS TO BOOST ANDROID WITHOUT ROOT[/b]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/2058739/]2.NRFO [/url]
[b] NO TOOT FULL OPTIMIZATION [/b]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/2065508/]3.WISP NO ROOT ENHANCER [/url]
[b] IT WILL ALSO OPTIMIZE YOUR DEVICE [/b]

[h3] [b]SUPPORT[/b] [/h3]
[url=https://godtspeed.xyz]Click here to visit GoDTspeed[/url]

[url=https://t.me/godTspeed]Join Official Channel[/url]

[url=https://t.me/godTspeed]Official Group to Share Your Problem[/url]


[h3][b] FIND MORE PROJECT FROM ☞ [/h3] [/b] [url=https://www.pling.com/u/revwhiteshadow] @revWhiteShadow [/url]

[h3][b]About.[/b][/h3]

GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST, developed by revWhiteShadow, is a revolutionary module designed to enhance the aiming capabilities of players in online multiplayer games. The main feature of this module is its ability to fix aim assets, ensuring precise and accurate aiming in various gaming scenarios.

One of the common challenges in online multiplayer games is the inconsistency of aim, often caused by factors like latency and input delay. However, with GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST, these issues are effectively addressed. The module incorporates advanced algorithms and techniques to minimize gyrodelay, resulting in a significantly improved aiming experience.

By utilizing GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST, players can expect a noticeable reduction in aim drift and smoother tracking of targets. The module intelligently compensates for any discrepancies caused by system lag or controller input delay, allowing players to maintain consistent and reliable aim throughout their gameplay.

Whether engaging in intense first-person shooters or competitive multiplayer battles, GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST provides players with a powerful tool to elevate their aiming skills and gain a competitive edge. With its innovative technology, this module aims to enhance the overall gaming experience, ensuring precise and accurate aim for players in online multiplayer environments.
[h2]Linux Installation[/h2]

Unzip the ZIP File:
unzip
Navigate to the Extracted Folder:

cd extracted_folder
Run the Installer:

For 32-bit systems:
./
For 64-bit systems:
./

[h2]Windows Installation[/h2]
Extract the zip:
Use a tool like WinRAR, 7-Zip, or the built-in Windows tool to extract the contents of the APK file.
Open Command Prompt:

Press Win + R, type cmd, and press Enter.
Run the Installer:

For 32-bit systems:
bash
For 64-bit systems:
bash

[h2]Android Installation / BlissOS / Other Emulator Installation[/h2]
Open Magisk / Kernel SU:

Ensure you have Magisk or Kernel SU installed on your device or emulator.
Go to the Module Section:

Open the Magisk app and navigate to the Modules section.
Select the Module from Storage:

Tap on "Select from Storage" and choose the previously downloaded file.
Install the Module:

After selecting the file, press "OK". The module will install itself.
Reboot the Device:

Once the installation is complete, reboot your device to finalize the installation.
[h2]Virtualisation Installation[/h2]
Step 1: Open LDPlayer,android studio or other simulation
Ensure LDPlayer, an Android emulator, is installed on your computer. Open LDPlayer to begin the process.

Step 2: Follow Android Installation
Within LDPlayer, follow the steps outlined in the Android Installation section:

Open Magisk or KernelSU within the emulator.
Navigate to the Modules section.
Select the module from storage.
Install the module.
Reboot the virtual device within LDPlayer.
[read more]

FIX AIM BOOST NO ROOT FAB

[h3] [b] MORE NON ROOTED TWEAKS [/b] [/h3]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/2056054/]1.GODSPEED MODE NO ROOT [/url]
[b] THIS APP HAS MORE THAN 30 OPTIONS TO BOOST ANDROID WITHOUT ROOT[/b]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/2058739/]2.NRFO [/url]
[b] NO TOOT FULL OPTIMIZATION [/b]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/2065508/]3.WISP NO ROOT ENHANCER [/url]
[b] IT WILL ALSO OPTIMIZE YOUR DEVICE [/b]

[h3] [b]SUPPORT[/b] [/h3]
[url=https://godtspeed.xyz]Click here to visit GoDTspeed[/url]

[url=https://t.me/godTspeed]Join Official Channel[/url]

[url=https://t.me/godTspeed]Official Group to Share Your Problem[/url]


[h3][b] FIND MORE PROJECT FROM ☞ [/h3] [/b] [url=https://www.pling.com/u/revwhiteshadow] @revWhiteShadow [/url]

[h3][b]About.[/b][/h3]

GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST, developed by revWhiteShadow, is a revolutionary module designed to enhance the aiming capabilities of players in online multiplayer games. The main feature of this module is its ability to fix aim assets, ensuring precise and accurate aiming in various gaming scenarios.

One of the common challenges in online multiplayer games is the inconsistency of aim, often caused by factors like latency and input delay. However, with GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST, these issues are effectively addressed. The module incorporates advanced algorithms and techniques to minimize gyrodelay, resulting in a significantly improved aiming experience.

By utilizing GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST, players can expect a noticeable reduction in aim drift and smoother tracking of targets. The module intelligently compensates for any discrepancies caused by system lag or controller input delay, allowing players to maintain consistent and reliable aim throughout their gameplay.

Whether engaging in intense first-person shooters or competitive multiplayer battles, GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST provides players with a powerful tool to elevate their aiming skills and gain a competitive edge. With its innovative technology, this module aims to enhance the overall gaming experience, ensuring precise and accurate aim for players in online multiplayer environments.
[h2]Linux Installation[/h2]

Unzip the ZIP File:
unzip
Navigate to the Extracted Folder:

cd extracted_folder
Run the Installer:

For 32-bit systems:
./
For 64-bit systems:
./

[h2]Windows Installation[/h2]
Extract the zip:
Use a tool like WinRAR, 7-Zip, or the built-in Windows tool to extract the contents of the APK file.
Open Command Prompt:

Press Win + R, type cmd, and press Enter.
Run the Installer:

For 32-bit systems:
bash
For 64-bit systems:
bash

[h2]Android Installation / BlissOS / Other Emulator Installation[/h2]
Open Magisk / Kernel SU:

Ensure you have Magisk or Kernel SU installed on your device or emulator.
Go to the Module Section:

Open the Magisk app and navigate to the Modules section.
Select the Module from Storage:

Tap on "Select from Storage" and choose the previously downloaded file.
Install the Module:

After selecting the file, press "OK". The module will install itself.
Reboot the Device:

Once the installation is complete, reboot your device to finalize the installation.
[h2]Virtualisation Installation[/h2]
Step 1: Open LDPlayer,android studio or other simulation
Ensure LDPlayer, an Android emulator, is installed on your computer. Open LDPlayer to begin the process.

Step 2: Follow Android Installation
Within LDPlayer, follow the steps outlined in the Android Installation section:

Open Magisk or KernelSU within the emulator.
Navigate to the Modules section.
Select the module from storage.
Install the module.
Reboot the virtual device within LDPlayer.

[h3][b]About.[/b][/h3]

GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST, developed by revWhiteShadow, is a revolutionary module designed to enhance the aiming capabilities of players in online multiplayer games. The main feature of this module is its ability to fix aim assets, ensuring precise and accurate aiming in various gaming scenarios.

One of the common challenges in online multiplayer games is the inconsistency of aim, often caused by factors like latency and input delay. The module incorporates advanced algorithms and techniques to minimize gyrodelay, resulting in a significantly improved aiming experience.

By utilizing GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST, players can expect a noticeable reduction in aim drift and smoother tracking of targets. The module intelligently compensates for any discrepancies caused by system lag or controller input delay, allowing players to maintain consistent and reliable aim throughout their gameplay.

Whether engaging in intense first-person shooters or competitive multiplayer battles, GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST provides players with a powerful tool to elevate their aiming skills and gain a competitive edge. With its innovative technology, this module aims to enhance the overall gaming experience, ensuring precise and accurate aim for players in online multiplayer environments.

Unzip the ZIP File:
unzip
Navigate to the Extracted Folder:

cd extracted_folder
Run the Installer:

For 32-bit systems:

For 64-bit systems:
./

Once the installation is complete, reboot your device to finalize the installation.

item.title: htop [System Monitoring]
item.itunes:title: htop [System Monitoring]
item.itunes:author: aurangzeb
item.itunes:summary:
htop
(System Monitoring)
htop is an interactive system monitor process viewer and process manager. It is designed as an alternative to the Unix program top. It shows a frequently updated list of the processes running on a computer, normally ordered by the amount of CPU usage.

[read more]
item.description:
htop
(System Monitoring)
htop is an interactive system monitor process viewer and process manager. It is designed as an alternative to the Unix program top. It shows a frequently updated list of the processes running on a computer, normally ordered by the amount of CPU usage.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
htop
(System Monitoring)
htop is an interactive system monitor process viewer and process manager. It is designed as an alternative to the Unix program top. It shows a frequently updated list of the processes running on a computer, normally ordered by the amount of CPU usage.

[read more]
